transcript: Customer: This is Mike Anderson calling about my furnace. It keeps cycling on and off every few minutes. The house is cold. Dispatcher: That sounds urgent, Mike. Is this at your home address we have on file, 321 Elm Boulevard? Customer: Yes, that's correct. Dispatcher: We can get an emergency technician out today within 2 hours. Customer: Please, that would be great. It's 25 degrees outside.

expected_entities.issue: Furnace short cycling - turning on and off every few minutes
